hero.body: Aspen McNealey turns brand ideas, content concepts, and people-first instincts into work that feels warm, memorable, and ready for a creative team.

workIntro.title: Ideas with a point of view.
workIntro.body: The portfolio mixes branding concepts, visual direction, and campaign-ready content. It feels casual on purpose, but the thinking is structured: audience, shelf appeal, mood, and momentum.

projects.title: Good Ode Branding
projects.copy: A better-for-you condiment concept built around clean ingredients, shelf appeal, and a retro-meets-modern personality.

projects.title: Coastal Cafe Concept
projects.copy: A sunny cafe direction with breezy visuals, approachable voice, and a local coastal feel made for food, coffee, and casual discovery.

projects.title: Mock Instagram Feed
projects.copy: A set of feed concepts for food and beverage moments, designed to feel scroll-stopping without losing clarity.

slideIntro.title: A closer look.
slideIntro.body: Brand boards, campaign ideas, and content concepts presented with the same playful polish as the full portfolio.

about.title: Creative mind, people person.
paragraphs: Aspen graduated in 2025 with a B.S. in Design and Innovation Management from Oregon State University. She is looking for her next role in marketing and talent management, bringing a visual eye, a team-first attitude, and eight years of customer service experience.
Outside work, she is into cooking, traveling, and wine tasting with friends. That mix shows up in the work: warm, curious, social, and built for real people.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.text: Color, type, moodboards, and clear visual systems.

items.title: Marketing Concepts
items.text: Campaign angles that make products feel memorable.

items.title: Photo Direction
items.text: Styled product shots with personality and intent.

items.title: Talent Mindset
items.text: People-first energy from years of service experience.

experience.title: Real-world rhythm.
experience.body: Service work, sales, and project management give Aspen practical instincts: read the room, stay organized, communicate clearly, and keep people moving toward a good outcome.

education.title: Oregon State University
education.text: B.S. in Design and Innovation Management, class of 2025. Earlier foundation at Cascade High School in Turner, Oregon.

contact.title: Let's make something people remember.
contact.body: For creative teams, hospitality brands, agencies, or talent-led businesses that need someone upbeat, organized, and visually fluent.
contact.social: LinkedIn + WhatsApp ready for direct outreach.
